Title: NeoLabCare 9-in-1 Skin Treatment
Body (HTML):
A lab-fresh 9-in-1 men's skin treatment. Produced to confirmed orders in a controlled fresh batch — dispatched within 7 days of production. No shelf time. No warehouse cycle.

One pump per day replaces your entire routine: moisturiser, serum, eye treatment, barrier repair, post-shave recovery, and more.

Formulated with peer-reviewed actives including liposomal NMN, GHK-Cu, centella asiatica, and panthenol. No retinol. No AHAs. No fragrance. No common irritants.

  • Produced after batch close
  • Dispatched within 7 days of production completion
  • Founding Edition engraving included
  • GMP-certified manufacturing
